revision.comment: rm Barons in Scotland pipe per req
revision.text: |- ! colspan="3" style="border-top: 5px solid #ACE777;" | {{#switch:{{{1}}} |#default=Regnal titles |arl=[[Kingdom of Arles|Arelat nobility]] |be=[[Belgian nobility]] |cm=Cambodian nobility |cn=[[Chinese nobility]] |de=[[German nobility]] |dk=[[Danish nobility]] |en=[[Peerage of England]] |en-bt=[[List of extant baronetcies|Baronetage of England]] |es=[[Spanish nobility]] |fr=[[French nobility]] |gb=[[Peerage of Great Britain]] |gb-bt=[[List of extant baronetcies|Baronetage of Great Britain]] |ie-bt=[[List of extant baronetcies|Baronetage of Ireland]] |ie=[[Peerage of Ireland]] |im=Head of State of the [[Isle of Man]] |it=[[Italian nobility]] |jp=[[Imperial House of Japan|Japanese royalty]] |leg=Legendary titles |nv=[[Kingdom of Navarre|Navarrese royalty]] |nl=[[List of Dutch noble families|Dutch nobility]] |pt=[[Portuguese nobility]] |sct=[[Peerage of Scotland]] |sct-bt=[[List of extant baronetcies|Baronetage of Nova Scotia]] |sct-ba=[[Baronage of Scotland]] |sr=[[Serbian nobility]] |to=[[Tongan nobles|Tongan nobility]] |uk=[[Peerage of the United Kingdom]] |uk-bt=[[List of extant baronetcies|Baronetage of the United Kingdom]] |vn=[[Vietnamese nobility]] |other=Titles of nobility }}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here. --> </noinclude>

|- ! colspan="3" style="border-top: 5px solid #ACE777;" | {{#switch:{{{1}}} |#default=Regnal titles |arl=[[Kingdom of Arles|Arelat nobility]] |be=[[Belgian nobility]] |cm=Cambodian nobility |cn=[[Chinese nobility]] |de=[[German nobility]] |dk=[[Danish nobility]] |en=[[Peerage of England]] |en-bt=[[List of extant baronetcies|Baronetage of England]] |es=[[Spanish nobility]] |fr=[[French nobility]] |gb=[[Peerage of Great Britain]] |gb-bt=[[List of extant baronetcies|Baronetage of Great Britain]] |ie-bt=[[List of extant baronetcies|Baronetage of Ireland]] |ie=[[Peerage of Ireland]] |im=Head of State of the [[Isle of Man]] |it=[[Italian nobility]] |jp=[[Imperial House of Japan|Japanese royalty]] |leg=Legendary titles |nv=[[Kingdom of Navarre|Navarrese royalty]] |nl=[[List of Dutch noble families|Dutch nobility]] |pt=[[Portuguese nobility]] |sct=[[Peerage of Scotland]] |sct-bt=[[List of extant baronetcies|Baronetage of Nova Scotia]] |sct-ba=[[Baronage of Scotland]] |sr=[[Serbian nobility]] |to=[[Tongan nobles|Tongan nobility]] |uk=[[Peerage of the United Kingdom]] |uk-bt=[[List of extant baronetcies|Baronetage of the United Kingdom]] |vn=[[Vietnamese nobility]] |other=Titles of nobility }}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here. --> </noinclude>

|- ! colspan="3" style="border-top: 5px solid #ACE777;" | {{#switch:{{{1}}} |#default=Regnal titles |arl=[[Kingdom of Arles|Arelat nobility]] |be=[[Belgian nobility]] |cm=Cambodian nobility |cn=[[Chinese nobility]] |de=[[German nobility]] |dk=[[Danish nobility]] |en=[[Peerage of England]] |en-bt=[[List of extant baronetcies|Baronetage of England]] |es=[[Spanish nobility]] |fr=[[French nobility]] |gb=[[Peerage of Great Britain]] |gb-bt=[[List of extant baronetcies|Baronetage of Great Britain]] |ie-bt=[[List of extant baronetcies|Baronetage of Ireland]] |ie=[[Peerage of Ireland]] |im=Head of State of the [[Isle of Man]] |it=[[Italian nobility]] |jp=[[Imperial House of Japan|Japanese royalty]] |leg=Legendary titles |nv=[[Kingdom of Navarre|Navarrese royalty]] |nl=[[List of Dutch noble families|Dutch nobility]] |pt=[[Portuguese nobility]] |sct=[[Peerage of Scotland]] |sct-bt=[[List of extant baronetcies|Baronetage of Nova Scotia]] |sct-ba=[[Baronage of Scotland]] |sr=[[Serbian nobility]] |to=[[Tongan nobles|Tongan nobility]] |uk=[[Peerage of the United Kingdom]] |uk-bt=[[List of extant baronetcies|Baronetage of the United Kingdom]] |vn=[[Vietnamese nobility]] |other=Titles of nobility }}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
|- ! colspan="3" style="border-top: 5px solid #ACE777;" | {{#switch:{{{1}}} |#default=Regnal titles |arl=[[Kingdom of Arles|Arelat nobility]] |be=[[Belgian nobility]] |cm=Cambodian nobility |cn=[[Chinese nobility]] |de=[[German nobility]] |dk=[[Danish nobility]] |en=[[Peerage of England]] |en-bt=[[List of extant baronetcies|Baronetage of England]] |es=[[Spanish nobility]] |fr=[[French nobility]] |gb=[[Peerage of Great Britain]] |gb-bt=[[List of extant baronetcies|Baronetage of Great Britain]] |ie-bt=[[List of extant baronetcies|Baronetage of Ireland]] |ie=[[Peerage of Ireland]] |im=Head of State of the [[Isle of Man]] |it=[[Italian nobility]] |jp=[[Imperial House of Japan|Japanese royalty]] |leg=Legendary titles |nv=[[Kingdom of Navarre|Navarrese royalty]] |nl=[[List of Dutch noble families|Dutch nobility]] |pt=[[Portuguese nobility]] |sct=[[Peerage of Scotland]] |sct-bt=[[List of extant baronetcies|Baronetage of Nova Scotia]] |sct-ba=[[Baronage of Scotland]] |sr=[[Serbian nobility]] |to=[[Tongan nobles|Tongan nobility]] |uk=[[Peerage of the United Kingdom]] |uk-bt=[[List of extant baronetcies|Baronetage of the United Kingdom]] |vn=[[Vietnamese nobility]] |other=Titles of nobility }}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:en>Cabayi|en>Cabayi]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
